summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Vanguard Total World Stock ETF (VT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of global stocks covering 98% of the domestic and emerging market capitalization. VT was launched on Jun 24, 2008 and is issued by Vanguard.

holdings.infoBox: VT is an equity ETF with a total of 10070 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.20%, Apple at 3.82%, Microsoft at 2.84%, Amazon.com at 2.21%, and Alphabet at 1.90%.
